title: ADP Fiscal 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for ADP's business description, client scale, worker scale, geographic reach, revenue categories, and profitability context.

title: ADP Workforce Now Product Page
note: Official product page describing ADP Workforce Now as an all-in-one HR, payroll, benefits, talent, time, analytics, and compliance platform.

title: RUN Powered by ADP Payroll Software
note: Official product page for ADP's small-business payroll and HR platform, including positioning for payroll, HR tools, add-ons, and small-business use.

title: ADP Payroll and HR Packages
note: Package comparison for RUN Powered by ADP features, useful for understanding the scope of payroll, HR, compliance, hiring, and support modules.

title: Automatic Data Processing Market Cap
note: Market-cap reference used for the registry snapshot and approximate market capitalization metric.

title: Automatic Data Processing P/E Ratio
note: P/E ratio reference for ADP's trailing valuation multiple around the May 2026 review date.

title: Frappe HR GitHub Repository
note: Public repository for Frappe HR, describing it as open-source HR and payroll software with modules for employee lifecycle, leave, attendance, payroll, taxation, and more.

title: Frappe HR Product Page
note: Official Frappe HR page describing the product as a 100% open-source HR and payroll system with transparency and flexibility.

title: OrangeHRM GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository for OrangeHRM, including GNU GPL licensing information and HRM project scope.

title: OrangeHRM Open Source
note: Official open-source edition page for OrangeHRM, supporting its classification as a plausible open-source HRM alternative.

title: Verifiable Credentials Use Cases
note: Standards use-case document for verifiable credentials, including claims about qualifications, achievements, government IDs, and other background information relevant to employment records.

title: Open Badges 3.0 Specification
note: Specification linking Open Badges assertions with W3C Verifiable Credentials and employment-related digital credential use cases.

title: OpenTimestamps
note: Open timestamping standard used to justify Bitcoin-anchored proof-of-existence for payroll artifacts, rule-pack releases, and audit logs.
